## Summary
<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what this PR does -->

## Related issue / backlog item
<!-- e.g. Closes #12, addresses EPIC 4 task "Implement heuristic-based difficulty adjustment" -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat -- new feature
- [ ] fix -- bug fix
- [ ] docs -- documentation only
- [ ] refactor -- no functional change
- [ ] test -- added or updated tests
- [ ] ci -- CI / build configuration
- [ ] chore -- other

## Affects
- [ ] Game logic (`game/`)
- [ ] AI agents (`ai/`)
- [ ] LLM clients (`ai/llm/`)
- [ ] UI (`ui/`)
- [ ] Persistence
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / workflows

## How was this tested?
<!-- Unit tests? Manual testing? Eval runs? -->

## Screenshots (if UI change)

## Checklist
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] Updated docs if behaviour changed
- [ ] Added or updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] No secrets / API keys committed
